Resilience Self-Help Guides
All guides
For the people who care for others

Resilience Self-Help Guides

A seven-part series for Apex Health Group staff — private, evidence-based, and designed to be used at your own pace, in your own time, in your own way.

Private — nothing leaves your device Evidence-based Designed for healthcare
Start here
Introduction & navigation

PPR Series — Interactive Guide

Begin with a short wellbeing self-assessment to find which of the seven guides is most relevant to how you are right now. Includes navigation to every guide in the series.

Open guide
About the series. There is also an overarching Resilience Guide that accompanies these seven interactive tools — speak to your team lead or the Training department if you’d like a copy.
The seven guides
Guide 01

TGROW Resilience Tool

A five-stage self-coaching reflection — Topic, Goal, Reality, Options, Way Forward — for working through a current situation with structure and care.

Open guide
Guide 02

Mindfulness & Regulation Skills

Practical tools for noticing what you’re feeling, settling your nervous system, and building daily practices that keep you steady under load.

Open guide
Guide 03

Values, Compassion & Empathy

Reconnect with what matters most to you in this work — and protect compassion as the renewable, but finite, resource it really is.

Open guide
Guide 04

Post-Incident Structured Debrief

A guided, confidential walk-through for processing a difficult clinical event — stage by stage — so it doesn’t stay stuck in your body.

Open guide
Guide 05

Peer Coaching Circle

A structured format for groups of three to six colleagues to think together — how to host, how to present, how to listen well.

Open guide
Guide 06

Cognitive Reframing

Notice unhelpful thinking patterns, work through the ABCDE model, and build a four-week practice for more flexible thinking under pressure.

Open guide
Guide 07

Energy Management & Recovery

Audit your physical, emotional, mental, and spiritual energy — and design recovery rituals that actually replenish you.

Open guide
A note on privacy. These tools run entirely in your browser. Nothing you type is sent to Apex Health, to a server, or to anyone else. Closing the tab will clear most of what you wrote — if you want a copy, use each guide’s built-in download or copy feature.
© Apex Health Group · Personal & Professional Resilience Series If anything in these guides has surfaced something heavy, please reach out to your GP, a qualified mental-health practitioner, or someone you trust.
